headline: James Murdoch Makes $300 Million Offer for New York Magazine, Podcasts

headline: James Murdoch in talks to buy Vox Media's New York Magazine, podcast unit, WSJ reports
summary: James Murdoch is in late-stage talks to buy Vox Media's New York Magazine and podcast division, the Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter. The...

headline: 3 Consumer Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Lately, it seems like demand trends have worked in their favor as the industry has returned 7.5% over the past six months, similar to the S&P 500.
